segments.text: He flies from a percentage where normal Ike would be totally fine!
segments.original_text: アイクなんて目じゃないぐらいのパーセントから飛びますけど

segments.text: Whiff punish with the forward tilt!

segments.original_text: シールドして上強攻撃

full_text: That's Super Aike! He flies from a percentage where normal Ike would be totally fine! Whiff punish with the forward tilt! Shield and up tilt!
